quoteLast: , and from four to five p.m., but when ordered to be taken in conjunction with the chalybeate, the former should be taken in the morning and the latter in the afternoon.  It has been customary for some medical men to prescribe the two waters mixed together.

quoteFirst: As a part of this excellent system, she had to walk round the square from
quoteLast: , but never alone; he was not going to have Sir Charles surprising her into an interview. He always went with her, and, as he was too stiff to walk briskly, he sat down, and she had to walk in sight. He took a stout stick with him--for Sir Charles.
